forecast_meta.growth_basis_note: Annual growth rates derived from quality score 5.7/10 and survivability 63.3%. Base: 7.0% p.a., Bull: 13.0% p.a., Bear: -21.1% p.a.
forecast_meta.method_explanation: This token is classified as a Cash-Flow Protocol — meaning it is a blockchain or decentralised finance (DeFi) protocol that earns real fee revenue from people using it, similar to how a business earns revenue. We use three methods to estimate its fair value. Network Activity (NVT) looks at how much trading volume flows through the network relative to its market cap — think of it like checking how busy a toll road is compared to what it costs to build. Fee/MC Multiple compares the total market cap to annual fee revenue, similar to a Price/Sales ratio for stocks — a lower ratio means you are paying less for each dollar of revenue the protocol earns. Rank Benchmark uses the historical relationship between a token's market cap rank and its price to anchor the estimate. The Speculative Fair Value shown is the average of whichever methods produced a reasonable result for this token.
forecast_meta.iv_selection_rationale: Bucket A (Cash-Flow Protocol): Up to 7 methods are available — Protocol Fee DCF, Fee/MC Multiple, Holder Revenue, Metcalfe Network Value, Network Activity (NVT), Rank Benchmark, and Dilution Adjustment. Protocol Fee DCF, Fee/MC Multiple, and Holder Revenue are unavailable: this token has no DeFiLlama fee tracking. Valuation relies entirely on network activity and market positioning signals. Rank Benchmark anchors to the expected market cap for this token's rank tier, quality-adjusted and capped at 2× current price to avoid distortion. Dilution Adjustment did not fire: FDV/MC is within the acceptable range for this quality tier, so no dilution penalty was applied. Only 1 method contributed to the median — the valuation should be treated as a rough anchor, not a precise fair value. Methods producing values outside 0.01x–15x of current price are excluded as outliers. The mean of all qualifying per-token estimates becomes the Speculative Fair Value.
forecast_meta.price_history_note: Historical price data unavailable for this token. Forecast chart shows projected values only.

We use three methods to estimate its fair value. Network Activity (NVT) looks at how much trading volume flows through the network relative to its market cap — think of it like checking how busy a toll road is compared to what it costs to build. Fee/MC Multiple compares the total market cap to annual fee revenue, similar to a Price/Sales ratio for stocks — a lower ratio means you are paying less for each dollar of revenue the protocol earns. forecast_meta.iv_selection_rationale: Bucket A (Cash-Flow Protocol): Up to 7 methods are available — Protocol Fee DCF, Fee/MC Multiple, Holder Revenue, Metcalfe Network Value, Network Activity (NVT), Rank Benchmark, and Dilution Adjustment. forecast_meta.method_explanation: This token is classified as a Cash-Flow Protocol — meaning it is a blockchain or decentralised finance (DeFi) protocol that earns real fee revenue from people using it, similar to how a business earns revenue. We use three methods to estimate its fair value. Network Activity (NVT) looks at how much trading volume flows through the network relative to its market cap — think of it like checking how busy a toll road is compared to what it costs to build. Fee/MC Multiple compares the total market cap to annual fee revenue, similar to a Price/Sales ratio for stocks — a lower ratio means you are paying less for each dollar of revenue the protocol earns. Rank Benchmark uses the historical relationship between a token's market cap rank and its price to anchor the estimate. The Speculative Fair Value shown is the average of whichever methods produced a reasonable result for this token.
forecast_meta.iv_selection_rationale: Bucket A (Cash-Flow Protocol): Up to 7 methods are available — Protocol Fee DCF, Fee/MC Multiple, Holder Revenue, Metcalfe Network Value, Network Activity (NVT), Rank Benchmark, and Dilution Adjustment. Protocol Fee DCF, Fee/MC Multiple, and Holder Revenue are unavailable: this token has no DeFiLlama fee tracking. Valuation relies entirely on network activity and market positioning signals. Network Activity (NVT) did not contribute to the median: the implied fair value fell outside the 0.1x–10x price bounds (volume is very low or very high relative to circulating supply). Rank Benchmark anchors to the expected market cap for this token's rank tier, quality-adjusted and capped at 2× current price to avoid distortion. Dilution Adjustment penalises the large gap between circulating and fully-diluted supply — future token unlocks are expected to create selling pressure. Only 2 methods contributed to the median. More data sources (DeFiLlama fee history) would improve confidence in this estimate. Methods producing values outside 0.01x–15x of current price are excluded as outliers. The mean of all qualifying per-token estimates becomes the Speculative Fair Value.
forecast_meta.price_history_note: Historical price data unavailable for this token. Forecast chart shows projected values only.
